name: Custom basket code
description: A unique code assigned by the structurer of the basket.
format: LEI of the structurer followed by not more than 52 alphanumeric characters
optionalityRules: Conditionally required for NEWT, MODI, CORR, REVI where the underlier is a basket (Paragraph 464).
Not reported for TERM, EROR, PRTO (Paragraph 464).
valueRules: If reporting entity is not the structurer and does not receive code in time, create own using own LEI (Paragraph 469(a)).

Report 'B' if the reporting entity has not entered into, in the 12 months ending on the preceding quarter day, more than 20 OTC derivatives that require reporting of a Custom basket code (Paragraph 469(b)).
If 'B' is not reported, the first 20 characters must be a valid GLEIF LEI of required registration status and pertain to a legal entity, not a branch (Paragraph 474(a)(ii)).
